title: × elyhordeum elymoides
intro: × Elyhordeum elymoides, also known as the Elymus elymoides or squirreltail grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Elymus elymoides include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
